title: Bounded AI Delegated Coordinator Closeout Template Execution
objective: Execute the next delegated dual-lane packet after Packet 832 publication by reusing the unchanged authoritative-host helper surface for a fresh admitted-trio live evidence tuple while publishing one reusable coordinator closeout template for later delegated packets under explicit coordinator ownership.
dependency_note: Packet 830 remains the helper-bootstrap-toolchains-python3-path floor, Packet 831 remains the delegated split-governance floor, and Packet 832 is now published with authoritative-host parity restored. This packet adds only a reusable coordinator closeout template as the next disjoint scaffold surface.
required_inputs: The current recommendation in PROJECT_STATUS.md that later delegated packets should reuse the Packet 831 split checklist plus the Packet 832 operator prompt template with a new disjoint lane objective
The delegated ownership, validation, and abort pattern in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-EXECUTION-CHECKLIST-2026-05-13.md
The reusable operator prompt structure in docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-OPERATOR-PROMPT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
The unchanged helper execution surface and focused truthfulness suite
The published Packet 832 closeout evidence once publication is complete
constrained_outputs: One fresh Packet 833 admitted-trio live evidence tuple emitted through tools/ai/run_authoritative_host_packet.py under tests/canary/host-bootstrap-status/actual and tests/canary/mcp-contract/actual
One disjoint reusable coordinator closeout template at docs/operations/OLARES-AI-DELEGATED-DUAL-LANE-COORDINATOR-CLOSEOUT-TEMPLATE-2026-05-13.md
One coordinator-owned closeout handoff for Packet 833 plus any needed PROJECT_STATUS.md routing update only after both lane validations and host parity restoration succeed
An explicit ABORTED closeout instead of partial success if lane ownership drifts, the helper surface requires mutation, or validation fails

lane_a.name: helper-driven live host evidence lane
allowed_actions: run the focused helper truthfulness pytest slice
publish only the Packet 833 artifact tuple emitted by the unchanged helper
forbidden_actions: changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, or business logic

lane_b.name: delegated coordinator closeout template lane
allowed_actions: author one repo-owned reusable coordinator closeout template for later delegated packets
reuse Packet 831 as the delegated split-governance floor and Packet 832 as the delegated operator prompt template floor
record the exact lane A tuple fields, lane B tuple fields, coordinator tuple fields, verdict wording, and boundary confirmation wording needed for later delegated closeout
forbidden_actions: editing live artifact files under tests/canary
changing auth, ingress, runtime posture, admitted services, or business logic

required_combined_checks: both lane-level validation tuples are present
the live helper result is PASS for Packet 833
the host returns to truthful not-running rest state
authoritative-host parity is restored without widening scope

execution_gate: Satisfied after Packet 832 publication and authoritative-host parity restoration on 2026-05-13.
publication_note: Lane A and Lane B validated cleanly, the Packet 833 closeout set was published, and authoritative-host parity was restored at the same clean head using only the bounded generated-artifact blocker remediation authorized by the delegated checklist.
